title: Statin use and breast cancer survival
text: Statin use after diagnosis was associated with improved survival in a cohort study.

title: Dietary fiber and cardiovascular risk
text: A higher fiber intake was associated with a lower cardiovascular risk score.

title: Heart failure and medication adherence
text: Medication adherence can influence outcomes in chronic heart failure.

title: Breast cancer screening interval
text: Screening interval changes affect detection timing in population studies.

title: Omega-3 supplementation trial
text: Omega-3 supplementation was evaluated in a randomized trial of adults.
